findings.issue: Acceptance Criteria require 'make lint' to pass. The Makefile 'lint' target runs golangci-lint + gosec, but the task description (line 41) also implies gosec runs as part of 'make lint'. The Makefile has a separate 'vuln' target (govulncheck) that the QA checklist does not invoke. This is not an error (vuln is not in scope per tech-spec Agent Verification Plan, which lists only test/lint/build), but the QA verdict should not silently treat govulncheck as covered.
findings.fix: No change required. Optionally note in the acceptance report that 'make vuln' is out of scope for this QA gate (tech-spec lists test/lint/build only).
